meta.title: Busting the WWII stealth MYTH: The failure of the Horten Ho 229
meta.description:
NOTE: After this episode was taken down with a copyright strike from Myth Merchant Films, we re-edited it to put it back up!

Despite what you may have seen on the internet, the Germans did not invent stealth aircraft in World War II. But let’s talk about why this myth has become so prevalent in recent years... and why we know it isn't true. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
